headings.styling: tracking-tight, elegant, sometimes italicized for emphasis

layout.border_radius: rounded-none or minimal rounded-sm (0px to 4px) to emphasize solid construction
layout.surfaces: Solid, tactile flat colors. No glassmorphism. Subtle ambient shadows for depth.

hero_background.description: High-end stamped concrete patio, architectural lighting.

service_amprentat.description: Close up view of stamped concrete pattern.

header.background: Solid bone white (#F9F7F3) with bottom border, no transparency

hero.layout: Asymmetrical split or large text overlay with 30-40% gradient overlay to ensure text contrast
hero.content: Headline in Cormorant Garamond emphasizing the 3 services. Terracotta primary button.

services_detail.layout: Grid of 3 items. Asymmetrical bento grid or staggered vertical cards.
services_detail.visuals: Use the 3 specific service images (amprentat, elicopterizat, verticalizat). Emphasize structural numbers (01, 02, 03) in typography.

about_quality.layout: Editorial text blocks, large quote style for Ionut Encea.
about_quality.content: Highlight Spanish materials, warranty, national coverage (toata tara). Use a tactile concrete texture overlay subtly in the background.

gallery.layout: Masonry or bento grid for project photos with hover scale effects.

reviews.layout: Horizontal scroll or simple minimal cards with high contrast text.

contact.layout: Two-column. Contact info on left, form on right. Form uses Shadcn customized to look flat, sharp borders, no roundness.

footer.layout: Large typographic 'RRS Team IMP', dark charcoal background (#1C1A17) with bone white text for high contrast.

admin_dashboard.theme: Consistent with public site but functional. Bone white background, charcoal sidebar.
admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (Overview, Gallery, Reviews, Messages). Data-dense tables.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons subtly translate-y-1 with darkened color. Images scale up slightly inside overflow-hidden containers.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use Framer Motion for staggered fade-in up of service items.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Smooth transform and opacity on interactable elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Cormorant Garamond and Manrope via Google Fonts in index.css.
Use strict Semantic HTML and Tailwind for landing page layout.
Utilize Shadcn components heavily in the Admin panel and customize them minimally to fit the brand.
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto anywhere.
All text in Romanian as per problem statement.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements.
Implement a clean JWT auth for the admin panel login.
Avoid generic 'SaaS' vibes. This is a physical, tactile, premium construction business.
Replace Shadcn card borders with 1px solid #D6D0C4, and remove large border radiuses (use rounded-sm max).
